name: NICE D&B KYC
description: NICE Groups credit-bureau KYC/KYB, identity verification and anti-fraud APIs for Korean fintechs.

seo.title: NICE D&B KYC — KYC / KYB / AML API
seo.meta_description: NICE D&B KYC: NICE Groups credit-bureau KYC/KYB, identity verification and anti-fraud APIs for Korean fintechs.

when_to_use: Korean identity and business verification for fintech KYC
Credit bureau data API for Korean financial services
Anti-fraud scoring for Korean neobank onboarding flows
KYB corporate identity check for Korean payment platforms
PEP and sanctions screening for Korean AML compliance

pros: Credit-bureau grade KYC/KYB data for Korea
Anti-fraud APIs tied to NICE credit infrastructure
Deep local coverage Korean fintechs need
Trusted by major Korean financial institutions
cons: Korea-only, not usable in other markets
review.verdict: Korea's NICE credit-bureau KYC stack, essentially mandatory locally and irrelevant elsewhere.
review.best_for: Korean fintechs and banks needing credit-bureau-grade KYC/KYB and anti-fraud APIs
review.not_for: Any team operating outside South Korea or without a Korean regulated entity
